description: The entity holds individuals accountable for their internal control responsibilities in the pursuit of objectives.

subcriteria.name: performance_accountability
subcriteria.reference_text: Performance evaluations include security and compliance responsibilities. Employees rated on adherence to policies, security practices, and internal control duties. Corrective actions or disciplinary measures applied for policy violations.

subcriteria.name: goals_and_incentives
subcriteria.reference_text: Measurable goals and performance criteria established for all roles including security responsibilities. Incentives, rewards, and bonuses aligned with both short-term and long-term objectives. Goals reviewed and approved by management annually.

subcriteria.name: management_oversight
subcriteria.reference_text: Department heads conduct regular team meetings to monitor progress against objectives. Status tracked and escalated when targets are missed. Weekly or monthly reporting on security metrics and KPIs.

mismatch_signals.reason: Technical log monitoring is not evidence of personnel accountability.
Disaster recovery configurations are not accountability mechanisms.
